title: Simple Bank Note
body:
A simple plugin that allows players with withdraw their money into banknotes.

**Why Use This**

There doesn't seem to be any simple and easy to use banknote plugins when I was looking for one for my server. There were a couple, but they were either outdated or had additional features that was not needed.

This plugin provides just the bare basics.

![Image of the banknote](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56af00bf04c444503205d586da074ef502ea2a64.png)

Command: /withdraw <amount>

And then right-click the banknote to deposit.

**Permissions**

```banknote.withdraw``` - Allows /withdraw banknote.

```banknote.deposit``` - Allows to deposit banknotes.

**Requirements**
Essentials plugin
